title: Inhouse Guns
description: Creating my own personal spin on firearms for Minecraft.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wb1O6I6zdEk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# WARNING: THIS DESCRIPTION MAY NOT BE FULLY UPDATED, SO FUTURE UPDATES MAY RELY ON AN IN-GAME GUIDE ADDED TO THE DATAPACK FOR CONVENIENCE.

This datapack adds craftable (vanilla friendly, I hope) guns to Minecraft, as well as a few other mechanics related to them. Crafting, shooting, possibly adding augments and other items?

_This datapack is still very much a work in progress, and updates will be slow and in between due to my other responsibilities. I hope to implement various other features that have been circling in my head in the future._

### FIREARMS
- **Bamboo Cartridge**: A simple improvised firearm. Only reaches 30 blocks, does average damage, and breaks upon usage.

![Crafting Recipe for the Bamboo Cartridge](https://imgur.com/SEW39jO.png)

- **Powder Rifle**: Sharp but still deadly. Reaches 60 blocks, crits at 40 and beyond. Medium aiming and fire rate.

![Powder Rifle](https://imgur.com/TdlO4cy.png)

- **Scattergun**: For closer ranges and larger groups of opponents. Reaches 10 blocks, crits at 5 blocks or closer. A little slower to aim and fire than the Powder Rifle.

![Scattergun](https://imgur.com/zVzl1hq.png)

To craft ammunition for each of these weapons, you will need paper, gunpowder and a few nuggets of iron. For a round, just one is enough. You will need a lot more, four to be specific, for some shot.

![https://imgur.com/UqqzxNu.png](https://imgur.com/UqqzxNu.png)
![https://imgur.com/bqEfyyV.png](https://imgur.com/bqEfyyV.png)

### ARMOR AND HELMETS

Tempered Iron Helmet: Made with tempered iron. Has increased stats compared to regular iron helmet.
![tempered iron helmet](https://i.imgur.com/IuiFH6h.png)

### ATTACHMENTS
_To use, hold gun in offhand and attachment in main hand._

- Silencer: _lessens sound of gun firing, also stops shots from blowing up creepers. Crafted using feathers and tempered iron._

![silencer](https://i.imgur.com/1i9Ee23.png)

- Extended Barrel: _Increases range and crit distance of rifle. Crafted using tempered iron. (Powder Rifle only)_

![extended barrel](https://i.imgur.com/oAwmrpd.png)

- Bayonet: _Melee attacks using the gun deal 5 points of damage. Crafted using tempered iron and a stick._

![https://i.imgur.com/qT5uFdu.png](https://i.imgur.com/qT5uFdu.png)

- Undead Charm: _Deals additional +5 to +7 damage to undead mobs. Crafted using string, tempered iron and a skeleton skull._

![https://i.imgur.com/h7ebty2.png](https://i.imgur.com/h7ebty2.png)

- Amber Charm: _Deals additional +5 to +7 damage to illagers. Crafted using string, tempered iron and resin brick._

![https://i.imgur.com/RpBqwY2.png](https://i.imgur.com/RpBqwY2.png)

- Sculk Piercer: _Allows gun to shoot through walls. Crafted using bone, an echo shard, and a catalyst._
 
![https://i.imgur.com/rFS5xpq.png](https://i.imgur.com/rFS5xpq.png)


- Screwdriver: _removes attachments from guns. Crafted using copper and tempered iron._

![https://i.imgur.com/1eB2hXs.png](https://i.imgur.com/1eB2hXs.png)

More content will come soon, I promise!
